close_reason: Style: to_string() vs to_owned() for &str is a lint preference, not a bug
description: secretx-k8s/src/lib.rs:313. Some("password".to_string()) — clippy::str_to_string lints this in some configs. .to_owned() is marginally preferred for &str → String because to_string goes through Display. Tests only; impact zero. Opinion-tagged.
title: to_string() on &'static str literal in test could be to_owned()
